items.name: Worn Black Beanie
items.description:
Dark, clean and versatile 🖤

This black ribbed beanie is the perfect accessory for emo, goth, streetwear and minimal aesthetic avatars. Simple but powerful, it adds a lowkey edgy vibe to any outfit without trying too hard.

Perfect for soft grunge, sad boy, dark street and minimalist looks. Easy to combine with layered clothing, hoodies and oversized fits.

✨ Works in R6 & R15
✨ Clean dark aesthetic
✨ Matches almost any outfit

Stay mysterious. Stay iconic.

🏷️ Tags:

black beanie, dark beanie, emo hat, goth style, streetwear accessory, aesthetic avatar, soft grunge, sad boy outfit, minimal style, winter cap, edgy roblox, r6 r15 compatible, dark outfit, roblox hat

items.name: ERSIN Official Cat Backpack
items.description:
ERSIN Cat Backpack 

Carry a piece of digital stardom wherever you go with the official exclusive ERSIN Cat Backpack! Created by Enrapture.world in partnership with ERSIN, the influencer and digital creator with over 1 million followers across multiple virtual worlds, this stylish backpack is not just a cute companion for animal lovers but a statement of creativity and adventure. Whether you're exploring magical realms or dominating the minigames, the ERSIN Cat Backpack is your perfect travel buddy—complete with sleek designs and feline flair. Show off your style and rep the universe of ERSIN with this one-of-a-kind accessory!
